evidence.source_title: 2016 Iranian Assembly of Experts election — Wikipedia
evidence.description: The Guardian Council's rejection of Hassan Khomeini's candidacy was part of the broader 2016 Assembly of Experts election vetting process, in which approximately 80% of applicants were disqualified.

editorial_notes: The Hassan Khomeini GC rejection event is a sub-event within the 2016 AoE election cycle.
